name: Embark Technology Inc. Warrants
summary: Embark Technology Inc. Warrants: These are warrants to purchase common stock of Embark Technology Inc., an autonomous driving technology company focused on developing self-driving software solutions for the trucking industry. Warrants give the holder the right, but not the obligation, to purchase shares of the company at a specified price within a certain timeframe. The company is based in San Francisco, California.
